2026-07-13 06:58:09

Friday - Markets continued their gradual advance as investor sentiment remained constructive. Buyers remained active despite periodic profit-taking, allowing the broader uptrend to stay intact. The recent strength has reinforced the current RiskOn regime, while TurboRegime continues to maintain a modest defensive allocation as an added layer of risk management.

Today (monday) - Pre-market trading pointed to a positive start, with equity futures indicating continued optimism heading into the session. While overnight trading often provides an early indication of market sentiment, TurboRegime does not make allocation decisions based on futures or intraday price movement. Instead, the strategy waits for confirmed end-of-day signals before making any portfolio changes, helping avoid the false starts and head fakes that frequently occur during the trading day.

This Trade - Seven trading days into the current RiskOn regime, the active trade has advanced to a gain of 0.94%, while the maximum drawdown since the regime began remains just -0.22%. The progression from a modest early decline to nearly a 1% gain illustrates the value of remaining patient and allowing market trends to develop rather than reacting to short-term volatility.  

TurboRegime remains in RiskOn, active since July 1. The current trade continues to perform as expected, recovering from a modest initial drawdown while exhibiting remarkably low volatility. This is consistent with the strategy's objective of identifying sustainable market trends rather than attempting to capture every short-term price swing. As always, allocation changes occur only after objective end-of-day confirmation, ensuring the strategy remains disciplined through changing market conditions.

Live Performance - Live tracking has now reached 103 days since beginning on April 1, 2026. During that period, TurboRegime has closed just six live trades while producing a cumulative return of 33.45%, compared with 15.53% for a buy-and-hold investment in SPY over the same period. This represents an outperformance of 17.92 percentage points while navigating multiple market environments using a disciplined, rules-based process.

Perhaps equally important is how those results have been achieved. TurboRegime has successfully navigated RiskOff, RiskOn, and RiskOn++ (Turbo)regimes, increasing exposure only when market conditions supported additional risk and becoming more defensive when conditions deteriorated. Rather than attempting to predict every market move, the strategy focuses on identifying meaningful regime changes that can materially influence long-term performance. Although the live track record is still in its early stages, the results continue to closely mirror the behavior observed throughout historical testing, providing growing confidence that the underlying methodology is performing as designed in real-world trading.  We don't try to predict the market, we listen to it and respond to it.
